title: Case statement incorrectly matches branch when using signed 1-bit input

features.name: case statement with ternary returning signed 1-bit value
features.description: Code should include a case statement with a ternary expression that returns a signed 1-bit value, where the ternary condition is a constant false condition selecting between a 1-bit literal and a signed operand

features.name: signed to unsigned comparison in case item matching
features.description: Code should include a case statement where a signed 1-bit value (sign-extended to multiple bits) is compared against case items with larger bit widths, causing a signed vs unsigned mismatch in comparison
